goal: Help Commander decide whether to downgrade risky healthcare claims and shift to consultation-first content.
assumptions: Official platform notices should outrank creator gossip.
Competitor moves matter only if they change operating constraints or opportunity structure.
evidence: Douyin creator notice from official account on medical claims review.
Competitor posting pattern change observed across last 7 days.
signal_summary: Medical efficacy claim enforcement tightened; competitors are pivoting toward low-risk consultation hooks.
recommended_attention: Prioritize route changes for healthcare content and freeze risky promises.
